modmenu.descriptionTranslation.scythesor: A client-side inventory sorting mod. Sort your inventories quickly and efficiently.
scythesorting.config.title: Scythe Sorting Configuration
scythesorting.config.sorting_mode.toolti: Choose how items are sorted in the inventory.
scythesorting.config.ascending_order.too: Sort items in ascending order (A-Z, smallest first). Disable for descending order.
scythesorting.config.merge_stacks.toolti: Merge identical item stacks before sorting to free up inventory space.
scythesorting.config.remember_mode.toolt: Remember the last selected sorting mode across game sessions.
scythesorting.config.show_button.tooltip: Show the sort button in inventory GUIs.
scythesorting.config.button_position.too: Choose where the sort button appears in the inventory GUI.
scythesorting.config.play_sound.tooltip: Play a click sound when sorting is triggered.
scythesorting.config.animate_button.tool: Show a brief animation when the sort button is clicked.
scythesorting.config.custom_order.toolti: Define the order of item categories when using the Custom sorting mode. Use category names: BUILDING_BLOCKS, NATURAL_BLOCKS, ORES, INGOTS, GEMS, REDSTONE, WOOD, STONE, DECORATION, FOOD, FARMING, TOOLS, WEAPONS, ARMOR, POTIONS, UTILITY, MOB_DROPS, MISC.
